name: apex-neural-memory
description: Workspace-local memory tool for the Apex Neural agent ecosystem. Stores, recalls, and lists memories as markdown files in .github/memory/.

languageModelTools.name: apex-neural_memory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Store, recall, and list workspace-local memories for the Apex Neural agent ecosystem. Memories are saved as markdown files with YAML frontmatter in the workspace .github/memory/ folder. Use action 'store' to save a memory, 'recall' to search memories, and 'list' to list all memories.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Manage workspace-local agent memories (store, recall, list)

action.description: The action to perform: 'store' saves a new memory, 'recall' searches existing memories, 'list' lists all memories.

agent.description: Agent name for scoping the memory (e.g., orchestrator, planner, architect, solutioner, tester, shared). Defaults to 'shared' if not specified.

task.description: Brief description of the task or context (used in YAML frontmatter and filename).

content.description: The memory content in markdown format. Used when action is 'store'.

outcome.description: The outcome of the task. Used when action is 'store'. Defaults to 'completed'.

query.description: Search query for the 'recall' action. Matches against tags, task, and content.
